<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>The Magical Mystery Tour</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  :root {
    --black: #0a0a0a;
    --hot-pink: #ff2d78;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --off-white: #f0f0f0;
  }
  body {
    background: var(--black);
    color: var(--white);
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }
  .container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 900px;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 40px 30px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
  }
  .top-line {
    width: 100%;
    height: 4px;
    background: var(--hot-pink);
    margin-bottom: 40px;
  }
  .brand {
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 6px;
    color: var(--hot-pink);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.2s;
  }
  .main-title {
    font-family: "Bebas Neue", sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(68px, 14vw, 130px);
    line-height: 0.88;
    text-align: center;
    color: var(--white);
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-bottom: 0;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.4s;
  }
  .title-line { display: block; }
  .title-line.highlight { color: var(--hot-pink); }
  .pink-rule {
    width: 100%;
    height: 3px;
    background: var(--hot-pink);
    margin: 20px 0 30px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeIn 0.6s ease forwards 0.7s;
  }
  .content-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 40px;
    width: 100%;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeUp 0.8s ease forwards 0.9s;
  }
  .photo-col { flex: 0 0 auto; width: 260px; }
  .photo-wrap { position: relative; width: 260px; }
  .photo-wrap img {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
    filter: contrast(1.05) brightness(0.95);
  }
  .photo-wrap::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    bottom: -6px; left: -6px; right: 6px; top: 6px;
    border: 2px solid var(--hot-pink);
    z-index: -1;
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  .text-col { flex: 1; padding-bottom: 8px; }
  .prize-amount {
    font-family: "Bebas Neue", sans-serif;
    font-size: 90px;
    line-height: 1;
    color: var(--hot-pink);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .prize-label {
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--off-white);
    margin-bottom: 28px;
  }

  /* PINK BOXES */
  .prize-items { list-style: none; margin-bottom: 28px; }
  .prize-items li {
    background: var(--hot-pink);
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    color: #000000;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .prize-items li .item-value {
    color: #000000;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  /* PINK ENTER BOX */
  .enter-box {
    background: var(--hot-pink);
    padding: 18px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
  }
  .enter-box p {
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.7;
    color: #000000;
  }
  .enter-heading {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 12px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    color: #000000;
    margin-top: 14px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .enter-steps { list-style: none; margin-top: 8px; }
  .enter-steps li {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #000000;
    padding: 3px 0;
  }
  .enter-steps li::before { content: "\2192  "; }

  .tcs {
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
    line-height: 1.6;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  }
  .bottom-bar {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 40px;
    padding-top: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease forwards 1.2s;
  }
  .bottom-brand {
    font-family: "Bebas Neue", sans-serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    color: var(--white);
    opacity: 0.6;
  }
  .bottom-handle {
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: var(--hot-pink);
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* COPY BUTTON */
  .copy-btn-wrap {
    width: 100%;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 30px;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease forwards 1.4s;
  }
  .copy-btn {
    background: var(--hot-pink);
    color: #000000;
    font-family: "Montserrat", sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 13px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    border: none;
    padding: 14px 40px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease;
  }
  .copy-btn:hover { background: #ff1166; transform: translateY(-1px); }
  .copy-btn:active { transform: translateY(0); }
  .copy-btn.copied { background: #00cc66; color: #000; }

  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; }
    to { opacity: 1; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .content-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
    .photo-col { width: 220px; }
    .prize-amount { font-size: 70px; }
    .text-col { width: 100%; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="container" id="pageContent">
  <div class="top-line"></div>
  <div class="brand">Social Media Sister</div>
  <h1 class="main-title">
    <span class="title-line highlight">&#163;5K</span>
    <span class="title-line">For Your</span>
    <span class="title-line">Clinic</span>
  </h1>
  <div class="pink-rule"></div>
  <div class="content-row">
    <div class="photo-col">
      <div class="photo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Vanessa - Social Media Sister" />
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="text-col">
      <div class="prize-amount">The Magical</div>
      <div class="prize-label" style="font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:32px; letter-spacing:2px; color:#ff2d78; margin-bottom:20px;">Mystery Tour</div>

      <ul class="prize-items">
        <li>
          <span>Full Content Day + Podcast Capture</span>
          <span class="item-value">worth &#163;1,500</span>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span>6 Month Done-For-You Social Media</span>
          <span class="item-value">worth &#163;3,500</span>
        </li>
      </ul>

      <div class="enter-box">
        <p>This year I&rsquo;m hitting the road &mdash; touring the entire country bringing my Content Days and Podcast experience to aesthetic clinics from Yorkshire to Scotland and everywhere in between.</p>
        <p style="margin-top:10px;">One very lucky clinic wins the whole thing. For free.</p>
        <p class="enter-heading">To enter &mdash; drop in the comments:</p>
        <ul class="enter-steps">
          <li>Your name</li>
          <li>Your clinic name</li>
          <li>Your Instagram handle</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <p class="tcs">T&amp;Cs apply. Open to new enquiries only. Not available to existing or previous clients of Social Media Sister. Winner must be located more than 5&ndash;10 miles from any existing client. Winner selected at random and contacted via Instagram DM.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="bottom-bar">
    <div class="bottom-brand">Social Media Sister</div>
    <div class="bottom-handle">@socialmediasister</div>
  </div>

  <div class="copy-btn-wrap">
    <button class="copy-btn" id="copyBtn" onclick="copyCode()">Copy Code for Replit</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function copyCode() {
  const html = document.documentElement.outerHTML;
  // Remove the copy button section from copied code
  const cleaned = html.replace(/<div class="copy-btn-wrap">[\s\S]*?<\/div>\s*<\/div>\s*<script>[\s\S]*?<\/script>\s*<\/body>/, "</div></body>");
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(document.documentElement.outerHTML).then(function() {
    const btn = document.getElementById("copyBtn");
    btn.textContent = "Copied!";
    btn.classList.add("copied");
    setTimeout(function() {
      btn.textContent = "Copy Code for Replit";
      btn.classList.remove("copied");
    }, 3000);
  }).catch(function() {
    // Fallback
    const ta = document.createElement("textarea");
    ta.value = document.documentElement.outerHTML;
    document.body.appendChild(ta);
    ta.select();
    document.execCommand("copy");
    document.body.removeChild(ta);
    const btn = document.getElementById("copyBtn");
    btn.textContent = "Copied!";
    btn.classList.add("copied");
    setTimeout(function() {
      btn.textContent = "Copy Code for Replit";
      btn.classList.remove("copied");
    }, 3000);
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
